:PROPERTIES:
:corpus-source:   Rector
:corpus-id:       R02
:corpus-severity: Important
:corpus-url:      https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-540-30202-5_5
:corpus-citation: Rector et al. (2004), "OWL Pizzas", EKAW 2004, sec. 3 (AND vs. OR in Domain and Range); reinforced by Horridge, CO-ODE Pizza Tutorial v1.5, ch. 5.
:corpus-expects:  planned/rector-domain-range-intersection
:corpus-rationale: Multiple rdfs:domain axioms on the same property
 are intersected by the reasoner, not unioned; authors usually
 intend the union.
:END:
#+title: Rector R02 -- multiple domain axioms intersect (not union)

* corpus-r02
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: corpus-r02
:ELOT-context-type: ontology
:ELOT-context-localname: corpus-r02
:ELOT-default-prefix: ex:
:header-args:omn: :tangle no
:END:
** Prefixes
:PROPERTIES:
:prefixdefs: yes
:END:
| prefix | uri                                   |
|--------+---------------------------------------|
| owl:   | http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#        |
| rdfs:  | http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema# |
| ex:    | http://example.org/corpus/r02/        |

** corpus-r02 ontology (ex:corpus-r02 ex:corpus-r02/0.0)
:PROPERTIES:
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
 - owl:versionInfo :: 0.0

** Classes
:PROPERTIES:
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
*** Person (ex:Person)
 - rdfs:label :: "Person"@en
*** Organization (ex:Organization)
 - rdfs:label :: "Organization"@en

** Object properties
:PROPERTIES:
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
*** has address (ex:hasAddress)
 - rdfs:label :: "has address"@en
 - Domain :: ex:Person
 - Domain :: ex:Organization
